summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user has MLBALL entitlement
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is scheduled/in-progress

steps.action: WHEN the user views the game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a blackout pill is displayed left aligned at the bottom of the game tile
AND a lock icon is displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header have a dark overlay
